scene.scenePrompt: Evening interior of a bakery, warm golden light filtering through windows, marble countertop in foreground. A glamorous woman in black suit, hand pressing a check onto the counter, leans forward, eyes locked directly at the viewer, lips slightly parted as if speaking. Her expression is cold and commanding. Behind her, blurred background with glass display cases and hanging pastries. Pop art style, high contrast, bold outlines, comic book dots texture, dramatic shadows from low evening sun. Vertical composition.

beats.narration: Just as you set down your piping bag, the shop door is flung open. A cold, elegant woman in a black suit walks straight to the counter and slaps a check onto the marble countertop. "Leave Gu Tingchen, or make his smile disappear," she says, enunciating every word. At the same time, Lin Xiaotang's gasp echoes from the kitchen. Through the monitor on the counter, you see Gu Tingchen standing in front of the freezer. He dips a finger into the freshly whipped cream you just made, pops it into his mouth, and turns his head to give you a childishly provocative smile—one you've never seen on him before.
beats.speaker: Bai Ruoyao
beats.line: Leave Gu Tingchen, or make his smile disappear.
beats.lineDelivery: Cold and haughty, unquestionable. Speaking slowly and deliberately, with an oppressive weight behind every word.

activeCharacters.name: Bai Ruoyao
activeCharacters.pose: In a black suit with a cold, haughty expression, slapping the check onto the counter, her gaze piercing.

activeCharacters.name: Gu Tingchen
activeCharacters.pose: On the monitor screen, dipping his finger in cream and turning his head with a provocative smile.

beats.narration: Suppressing your shock, you look her straight in the eye.
beats.speaker: You
beats.line: Who are you? What gives you the right to run wild in my shop?

activeCharacters.name: Bai Ruoyao
activeCharacters.pose: Slightly raising her chin with a cold smirk, she pulls a business card from her holder and slides it in front of you.

activeCharacters.name: Gu Tingchen
activeCharacters.pose: On the monitor screen, he watches with great interest, as if he can hear the conversation.

beats.narration: Bai Ruoyao sets down the card, drops a cold 'You only have three days,' and turns to leave, her high heels clicking away. The shop falls quiet, and on the monitor, Gu Tingchen is waving at you.

activeCharacters.name: Bai Ruoyao
activeCharacters.pose: Already turned toward the door, her back cold and aloof.

activeCharacters.name: Gu Tingchen
activeCharacters.pose: On the monitor screen, he is beckoning you with his finger, a sly smile on his face.

choices.label: Go to the kitchen to find him

effect.nextSceneSeed: You push open the kitchen door. Gu Tingchen is waiting for you, the smile still lingering on his face, but his eyes have turned serious.
Forcing yourself to stay calm, you pick up the piping bag. Suddenly, your phone vibrates. It's a text from Gu Tingchen: 'I know the secret of your shop.'

beats.narration: Ignoring the woman at the counter, you turn and rush into the kitchen. Lin Xiaotang is holding up her phone to record, but quickly puts it down when she sees you enter. Gu Tingchen leans against the prep table, licking the cream off his finger.
beats.speaker: Gu Tingchen
beats.line: Don't be nervous. I just wanted to confirm for myself if your cakes really have magic. And indeed... my mood has turned blue.
beats.lineDelivery: His tone is relaxed and playful, but a deeper meaning hides in his eyes.

activeCharacters.name: Gu Tingchen
activeCharacters.pose: Leaning against the prep table with his white shirt sleeves slightly rolled up, cream still on his finger, looking at you with a half-smile.

activeCharacters.name: Lin Xiaotang
activeCharacters.pose: Cowering in the corner, her phone screen still lit, her expression a mix of embarrassment and curiosity.

choices.label: Trust him and press for details

effect.nextSceneSeed: Gu Tingchen drops his playful act and whispers, 'Someone in the Gu family wants to hurt you. I need your cake to prove something.' You decide to play along with him.

choices.label: Kick him out to avoid trouble

effect.nextSceneSeed: With a cold face, you ask him to leave. Instead, he whispers in your ear, 'You'll come looking for me,' and leaves a phone number. Late at night, you find yourself staring blankly at the business card and the check.

characters.name: Bai Ruoyao
characters.voiceDescription: Female, around 25 years old, dessert shop owner. Her voice is sweet and soft with a hint of mystery, speaking at a gentle pace but occasionally rising playfully. She has a gentle yet resilient personality and rich emotions. Standard Mandarin, speaking with light, airy chuckles that evoke the magical essence of candy.
characters.visualDescription: 20s female, retro pin-up style, voluminous bob cut hair in candy pink with black streaks, large expressive eyes with heavy eyeliner and dramatic lashes, bold red lips, heart-shaped beauty mark on cheek, wearing a black-and-white polka dot bandana, a pastel pink off-shoulder dress with cherry print apron, white lace gloves, pearl necklace, high-contrast colors, comic-style halftone dots, pop art aesthetic, vibrant and playful yet enigmatic.

characters.name: Gu Tingchen
characters.voiceDescription: Male, early 30s. His voice is deep, magnetic, and slightly husky, with a cold and detached demeanor. He speaks slowly and steadily with clear enunciation. Standard Mandarin with a slight Beijing accent, his voice naturally carrying a sense of aloofness, though occasionally revealing an almost imperceptible touch of warmth.
characters.visualDescription: male, around early 30s, slicked-back black hair, sharp and cold eyes with a hint of arrogance, defined angular jawline, thin lips, wearing a tailored dark navy suit with subtle pinstripes, white shirt, black silk tie, pocket square with a pop art comic dot pattern, high-contrast shading, bold outlines, saturated colors, authoritative and aloof aura

characters.name: Lin Xiaotang
characters.voiceDescription: Female, early 20s. Her voice is sweet and crisp like cotton candy, full of energy and slightly playful. She speaks at a bright, lively pace. She has a cheerful, laugh-loving personality but occasionally flashes a hint of mystery. Standard Mandarin, her tone carrying a candy-like joy and magical lightness.
characters.visualDescription: young woman in early 20s, candy-colored twin tails in pink and mint, large expressive eyes with heart-shaped highlights, rosy cheeks, red lips, dramatic retro makeup, wearing a polka-dot apron dress with high waist, bright yellow and hot pink stripes, bold black outlines, halftone dot shading, overall cute and vibrant, Pop Art style, high saturation contrasting colors

storyState.logline: Can a cake that changes people's moods melt the icy heart of a conglomerate heir, or will it only drag her into a deadly conspiracy involving his family's dark business dealings?
storyState.genreTags: Sweet Romance / Business Suspense / Twist-filled Drama / Pop Visuals
storyState.protagonist: You are the owner of the dessert shop 'Pop Sweetheart,' possessing the magic to turn desserts into emotional color swatches. Just now, a cold man in a suit pushed open the door. Frowning and scoffing at everything, he ordered the 'Broken Rainbow' from your secret menu. You wanted to use this cake to pry open his heart, unaware that you had already stepped into the murky waters of his family's power struggle.
storyState.castNotes:
Gu Tingchen: On the surface, a cold and harsh sole heir to a conglomerate, but deep down, he craves color while suppressing himself. He shows a weakness because of your cake, becoming the most dangerous piece on your chessboard.
Old Master Gu: The patriarch of the Gu family, who views emotions as a weakness and advocates for marriages of pure interest. He secretly sends people to monitor Gu Tingchen, both wary of and coveting your 'magic.'
Lin Xiaotang: Your apprentice and best friend, seemingly carefree but actually possessing a sharp intuition. She is the first to notice the abnormal magic of the cakes and warns you that 'some customers are not to be messed with.'
storyState.synopsis: At dusk, Bai Ruoyao storms into the dessert shop, slapping down a check to threaten you into leaving Gu Tingchen. Meanwhile, Gu Tingchen sneaks a bite of your cake in the kitchen, flashing an unusual smile. You face a dilemma: deal with the woman first, or rush into the kitchen.
openThreads: What kind of Gu family conspiracy lies behind Bai Ruoyao's threat?
Why can Gu Tingchen feel the cake's magic? What is his true motive?
The source of your cake's magic remains unknown, making it a potential tool to be exploited.
relationships: Bai Ruoyao: Hostile. She is a threat sent by the Gu family, with unknown motives.
Gu Tingchen: Mysterious and unpredictable. He seems interested in your cake's magic and is intentionally getting close to you.
Lin Xiaotang: Curious and worried. She witnessed Gu Tingchen's unusual behavior.
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: Depending on your choice, you will either have a secret talk with Gu Tingchen in the kitchen or face his covert contact alone.

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game geared towards a [Female-oriented] audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid twists in the style of popular short-form web dramas.
Story Style: Multi-branching twists. Pacing: Fast-paced and satisfying.
Opening setup of the featured story 'Pop Sweetheart': You are a dessert shop owner whose pastries have the magical power to change people's moods into colors. When a cold conglomerate heir smiles for the first time because of your 'emotion cake,' a vibrant battle of love and wits begins—only to drag you into his family's cold, black-and-white business conspiracy.
Please dive straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and instant gratification. Keep the density of twists in subsequent branches high, like a short drama, so every choice the player makes has an immediate impact.
styleGuide: Pop Art style illustration, vertical composition. A captivating, classically gorgeous retro woman with intense, alluring eyes, red lips, and dramatic makeup, alongside a tall speech bubble with an exclamation point. Rendered with comic book dots and bold outlines, high-saturation contrasting colors.
